info.name: Asana Memberships API
info.description:
The Asana Memberships API manages the relationship between a team or user and an object in Asana. Currently supports memberships for goals, projects, and portfolios.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

request.description: Returns the complete record for a single membership.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the record for a single membership.
